entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Rule-Validation-PruningCertificationObjects2 Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE CertificationItem PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <CertificationItem bundle="IT2ADEngineering" created="1737029699459" id="c0a800fb94691e9b81946f09c78302c9" modified="1737029699679" significantModified="1737029699679" summaryStatus="Open" targetDisplayName="IT2ADEngineering" targetId="IT2ADEngineering" targetName="IT2ADEngineering" type="Bundle"> <ApplicationNames> <String>ActiveDirectory</String> </ApplicationNames> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="IIQ_roleDetection"> <value> <RoleDetection date="1720269334653" roleId="IT2ADEngineering" roleName="IT2ADEngineering"> <RoleTarget applicationId="ADX" applicationName="ActiveDirectory" displayName="Donna Scott" nativeIdentity="CN=Donna Scott,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"> <AccountItem name="memberOf"> <value> <Set> <String>CN=ENG_All,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com</String> <String>CN=ENG_EastCoast,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com</String> </Set> </value> </AccountItem> </RoleTarget> </RoleDetection> </value> </entry> </Map> </Attributes> <BundleEntitlements> <EntitlementSnapshot application="ActiveDirectory" displayName="Donna Scott" nativeIdentity="CN=Donna Scott,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="memberOf"> <value> <Set> <String>CN=ENG_All,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com</String> <String>CN=ENG_EastCoast,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com</String> </Set> </value> </entry> </Map> </Attributes> </EntitlementSnapshot> </BundleEntitlements> </CertificationItem>
